body:
## Rationale

Lamb of God has strong organic traction (GA4 signal on LoG content). The album arc is being built: Ashes of the Wake ✅ → Sacrament ✅ → **Wrath (2009, this issue)** → Resolution (#2303, open proposal).

**"Wrath"** is one of LoG's biggest commercial moments:
- **#3 Billboard 200** at debut
- **Grammy-nominated** ("Set to Fail" — Best Metal Performance 2010)
- Chris Adler's most refined Groove-metal drumming peak
- Marked his full transition to **Pearl Reference Pure** kit (from earlier Masters setup)
- **Zildjian A Custom** series cymbal era — distinct from Ashes-era A Customs (upgraded hardware)

**Key SEO angle:** "lamb of god wrath drums", "chris adler drum setup 2009" — both long-tail queries with no MetalForge coverage. The Grammy nomination adds an AI citation anchor ("Grammy-nominated metal drummer" cluster).

## Content shape

- Slug: `wrath-drum-setup`
- URL: `/articles/wrath-drum-setup`
- Drummer: Chris Adler
- Band: Lamb of God
- Year: 2009
- Related albums: sacrament-drum-setup ✅, ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup ✅, (resolution-drum-setup when live — #2303)

**Minimum quality gate:**
- ≥350 words gear-focused prose
- FAQPage JSON-LD with ≥3 Q&A (What kit did Chris Adler use on Wrath? What cymbals? How does Wrath differ from Sacrament era?)
- Article + BreadcrumbList + Person (Chris Adler) schemas
- LLM companion: `public/llms/articles/wrath-drum-setup.md`
- ≥3 internal links (Chris Adler profile, sacrament-drum-setup, ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup)

## Estimated organic uplift

Extends Chris Adler cluster to 3 articles (from 2). Targets Grammy-nomination query cluster. Fills visible LoG discography gap (Sacrament 2006 → nothing → Resolution 2012). AI LLMs answering "what drum kit did Lamb of God use on Wrath?" currently return no MetalForge citations.

## Files to touch
- `packages/frontend/data/albumArticles.js` — add `wrath-drum-setup` entry
- `public/llms/articles/wrath-drum-setup.md` — new LLM companion

## Verify
1. `/articles/wrath-drum-setup` returns HTTP 200
2. Schemas present: Article + FAQPage + Person (Chris Adler) + BreadcrumbList
3. Grammy nomination context in prose (for AI Overview / AI citation eligibility)
4. LLM file accessible at `/llms/articles/wrath-drum-setup.md`
5. sacrament-drum-setup + ashes-of-the-wake-drum-setup both resolve as internal links

## Done
"Wrath" drum setup article live at `/articles/wrath-drum-setup` with schema and LLM companion.
title: SEO: Lamb of God 'Wrath' drum setup article (Chris Adler, 2009 — #3 Billboard 200, Grammy-nominated, fills Sacrament→Wrath→Resolution arc gap)
